tasks.label: Someting: Start Local Platform
tasks.detail: Starts the Postgres, Caddy, and Control Plane containers in the background.

tasks.label: Someting: Stop Local Platform
tasks.detail: Stops and removes the platform containers.

tasks.label: Someting: View App Logs
tasks.detail: Streams the logs from the Fastify management app.

tasks.label: Someting: Deploy control plane to VPS (SSH + git + compose)
tasks.detail: SSH to the VPS; tries multiple paths for .git, then git pull --ff-only + docker compose up -d --build.

tasks.label: Someting: VPS rebuild only (compose, skip git)
tasks.detail: Use when control-plane folder has compose.yaml but no .git (e.g. rsync/copy). Finds first compose.yaml among candidate paths.

tasks.label: Someting: Sync workspace to VPS and rebuild (recommended)
tasks.detail: Tar excludes node_modules/runtime/dist/.git/.env then scp extract to /opt/someting (or SOMETING_SYNC_REMOTE_DIR) and docker compose up -d --build.

tasks.label: Someting: Open SSH session on VPS
tasks.detail: Interactive SSH via deploy/someting.cmd. Edit that file for host or key.

tasks.label: Someting: Backup platform to local _BACKUP
tasks.detail: Dumps Postgres (via SSH tunnel), deployed site code + Caddy config, and each site's mounted shared/ volume into _BACKUP/<timestamp>/.
